summary: Adding batch_size parameter to multiple options for chunked processing

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
summary: Implementing dynamic default resolution (dict-based defaults) for click options

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py
summary: Done: added batch_size param to Option.__init__, its __debug__ validation block, Option.to_info_dict, new Option.process_value override, and module-level _batch_iter() helper near existing batch() fn (~line 92). Only touched Option class, not Parameter base __init__ signature itself, so dict-default work on Parameter.default should be low-conflict.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py
summary: Done: dict-based dynamic defaults on Option (validate in __init__, store as _dynamic_default, resolve via new Option._resolve_dynamic_default + Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults second pass after parse_args loop), plus (dynamic) help text. No changes to Parameter base signature or Option.process_value.
